title: US-Iran war: Trump tells Congress hostilities ‘terminated’, sidesteps war powers deadline
summary_full: US President Trump has declared hostilities with Iran have ended, despite ongoing US troop presence and persistent regional tensions. This assertion, made in a letter to Congress, aims to bypass the War Powers Resolution's requirement for military action authorization.
